hero.title: Insurance & Protection
hero.subtitle: Peace of Mind for Every Shipment
hero.description: Protect your valuable shipments with our comprehensive insurance and protection services. From standard coverage to premium protection, we ensure your goods arrive safely or you're fully compensated.

overview.title: Why Choose Our Shipping Insurance?
overview.description: Our insurance and protection plans offer comprehensive coverage against loss, damage, and theft during transit. With easy claims processing and quick settlements, you can ship with confidence.

features.title: Comprehensive Coverage
features.description: Protection against loss, damage, theft, and natural disasters for all shipment types.

features.title: Flexible Plans
features.description: Choose from standard, premium, or custom coverage options to fit your needs and budget.

features.title: Simple Claims Process
features.description: Easy online claims submission with minimal documentation and fast processing.

features.title: Quick Settlements
features.description: Rapid claim verification and payment within 48-72 hours of approval.

cta.title: Ready to Protect Your Shipments?
cta.description: Contact us to learn more about our insurance options and find the right coverage for your shipping needs.
